hero.title: Historical and Ethnographic Museum
hero.subtitle: Krujë · Albania
hero.tagline: Two museums — one thousand years of history. Skanderbeg's castle and the ethnographic kulla.

museums.heading: Two Museums — One Heritage
museums.subtitle: Two unique institutions within the historic walls of Krujë
museums.skanderbeg_desc: Within the historic castle of Krujë, the museum honours Albania's national hero — Gjergj Kastrioti Skanderbeg. Original weapons, documents and artifacts from the 1443–1468 period tell the story of 25 years of heroic resistance against the Ottoman Empire.
museums.ethnographic_desc: Housed in a traditional 18th-century Albanian kulla (tower house), the ethnographic museum brings everyday life in Ottoman-era Krujë to life. Costumes, vessels, jewellery and household objects reveal Albanian culture and customs across the centuries.

gallery.heading: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Images from the museums and their artifacts

visit.heading: Plan Your Visit
visit.accessibility_text: The Historic Museum is located within the castle and features stairways. The Ethnographic Museum has limited wheelchair access. For specific accessibility needs, please contact us in advance.
visit.directions_tirana: 30 minutes from Tirana by car via the Tirana–Krujë road
visit.directions_bus: Buses from Tirana terminal (Sheshi Shqiponja) every hour — 60 Lekë
visit.directions_taxi: Taxi from Krujë lower town to the castle — approximately 5 minutes
visit.google_subtitle: Read visitor reviews and share your experience
visit.reviews_disclaimer: Reviews are sourced from Google Maps — an independent visitor platform.
visit.tickets_online_desc: Official Albanian state service — purchase your ticket before your visit.
